statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Owner Workflow Upgrade slice: added `diagnostics.html#audio-display-workflow` for radio/display/no-sound/screen-only/recent-audio-work symptoms, wired it into the diagnostics shortcut nav, quick checks, Fuse Symptom Finder, and system cards.

Updated search so `radio not working` and related phrases surface the new flow, added a future browser-smoke assertion, and bumped the service worker cache to `ridgeline-console-v252`. Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, and `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`.

Verification:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Edge `--dump-dom` still hit the known empty-DOM issue.
- Playwright/Chrome fallback passed for desktop and iPhone-width mobile, no horizontal overflow, search result coverage, and Search Escape scroll-lock cleanup.
- Screenshots: `debug-screenshots/audit-v252-diagnostics-audio-desktop.png`, `audit-v252-diagnostics-audio-mobile.png`, `audit-v252-search-radio-not-working.png`.

Sources used and recorded:
- https://www.hondainfocenter.com/2019/Ridgeline/Feature-Guide/Interior-Features/Audio-System/
- https://www.hondainfocenter.com/2019/Ridgeline/Feature-Guide/Interior-Features/Display-Audio-with-HondaLink---RTL-T-and-above/
- https://owners.honda.com/utility/download?path=%2Fstatic%2Fpdfs%2F2019%2FRidgeline%2FMY19_Ridgeline_Audio_and_Connectivity.pdf

Next clean slice: improve iPhone orientation with current-page indicators in the universal header/menu now that Diagnostics has several deep workflow sections.
